summary: Iteration 48: Tested multiple frontend fixes including Signup UX improvements, ChecklistPage syntax fix, and LoginPage password toggle. All features verified working correctly.

signup_page_loads.description: Signup page loads and renders correctly at /signup

signup_name_step_red_asterisks.description: First Name and Last Name fields show red asterisks (* in text-red-400 class)

signup_marital_step_spouse_clarifier.description: When 'Married' is selected, clarifier text appears: 'Your spouse will be added as a beneficiary in the next step — do not count them as a dependent below.'

signup_marital_step_bottom_note.description: Bottom note displays: 'Don't include your spouse — only children, elderly parents, or other individuals you financially support.'

signup_beneficiary_middle_name.description: Middle Name field is present in beneficiary enrollment step between First Name and Last Name
signup_beneficiary_middle_name.code_verified: SignupPage.js line 644, Screenshot confirms Middle Name label and placeholder

signup_minor_optional_email.description: Minor dependents show optional email field with label 'Email (optional)' and placeholder 'Their email address (if applicable)'
signup_minor_optional_email.code_verified: SignupPage.js lines 659-664, Screenshot shows Email (optional) for Minor Dependent 1

signup_scrollable_form_steps.description: Form steps container uses overflow-y-auto for scrollable content instead of overflow-hidden

signup_credentials_red_asterisks.description: Credentials step has red asterisks on Email, Password, and Confirm fields

checklist_page_no_error.description: Checklist page (IAC) loads without 'Something went wrong' error. Displays Immediate Action Checklist with 30 items.
checklist_page_no_error.fix_verified: ChecklistPage.js stopAISuggest closing brace fix at lines 212-213

admin_dashboard_loads.description: Admin dashboard loads correctly with all metrics and user list

login_password_toggle.description: Password toggle button correctly switches input type between 'password' and 'text'
login_password_toggle.code_verified: LoginPage.js line 200: showPassword state used correctly

seed_data_creation: None - OTP disabled in platform_settings collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: All signup UX improvements verified: red asterisks on required fields (Name step: First/Last, Credentials step: Email/Password/Confirm), spouse clarifier text on marital step when married selected, middle name field in beneficiary enrollment, optional email for minor dependents, scrollable form container (overflow-y-auto). ChecklistPage syntax fix verified - page loads without error. Login password toggle works correctly. OTP is disabled in platform_settings (otp_disabled: true in test_database collection).
